title: cassipourea subcordata
intro: Cassipourea subcordata, a plant species native to tropical Africa, is also known as the 'African Oak'. The medicinal properties of Cassipourea subcordata include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. This plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cassipourea subcordata include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken orally for medicinal purposes.
